description: Per-key merge policy for ~/.claude/settings.json. Consumed by scripts/intelligent_settings_merge.py. Replaces the hard-coded REPLACE behavior in the deprecated scripts/merge-settings.py.

env.rationale: Kit ships broadly-needed env defaults (UV_NATIVE_TLS=1 for corporate-TLS proxies); user-set vars (e.g., NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS) must survive upgrade.

enabledPlugins.rationale: User may have manually enabled plugins the kit doesn't ship (e.g., sourcegraph); upgrade must not disable them. Kit adds new entries but never removes user entries.

extraKnownMarketplaces.rationale: User may have added custom marketplaces (e.g., internal org marketplace); upgrade must preserve them. Kit re-asserts its own marketplaces but doesn't touch user-added ones.

effortLevel.rationale: If user has explicitly set effortLevel, preserve. If absent, take kit default.

default_strategy_for_unlisted_keys.rationale: Any top-level key not in this policy is treated as user-owned and untouched by upgrade. Kit never introduces new top-level keys without adding them here first.
